actionUnits.condition: Validate serialization and setup match attached script Fire (m_Script guid=1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d). Scene MonoBehaviour fields for this instance: debug=0, isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, timeToOn=3 (runtime randomized in Awake), timeToOnDelta=0, shouldTurnOn=0, onNeighbors=0, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, downNeighborDist=0.5, maxHitInterval=2, currentHitInterval=0, totalHitTime=5, currentHitTime=0, neighbors=[], onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo=fileID 1849464941111748095. BoxCollider enabled, no Rigidbody. No UnityEvent m_Calls present. This confirms the MonoBehaviour component in the scene file is the exact settings for the attached script.

Neighbor ignition test. Preconditions required: at least 2 Fire neighbors within maxNeighborDistance (<=4) of this object and referenced in this.neighbors; onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold (2). Optionally ensure at least one neighbor is below this fire by > minNeighborDownDistance (3) to exercise downMultiplier (2) path. With shouldTurnOn auto-set true by CheckNeighborState when neighbors are on, waiting for timeToOn (random between 40-60, accelerated by downMultiplier if hasDownNeighbor) should flip isOn=true and call UpdateFireState(true), which plays ParticleSystem and notifies neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1).

Water extinguish test. Preconditions: fire is currently on (isOn=true). During the trigger window, an external water system must repeatedly call IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(normal) on this object at intervals < maxHitInterval (2s), accumulating currentHitTime until it reaches totalHitTime (5s). Expected: isTurningOff toggles true on first hit, currentHitInterval is reset each hit, and upon reaching currentHitTime >= 5s, fire turns off (isOn=false), shouldTurnOn=false, timers reset, UpdateFireState(true) invoked, ParticleSystem stops, neighbors notified, FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1).

Re-ignition after extinguish. Preconditions: After being turned off by water, ensure neighbor conditions remain (or become) onNeighbors >= 2 again so CheckNeighborState sets shouldTurnOn=true and, after waiting timeToOn (40-60, possibly faster with down neighbor), fire turns on again and UpdateFireState(true) is called.
